title: A myself(关于自己）
content:
Hello,
  I am li Yuxiang.
  I am a boy.
  I'm nine years old.
  I'm tall and strong.

title: B hobbies（个人兴趣爱好）
content:
I like reading and writing.
  I like painting too.
  I like swimming.
  I like playing basketball and online-games.

title: C family（家庭背景）
content:
I have a happy family.
  My father is a superman.
  he can do everything.
  My mother is a nurse.
  she works in a hospital.
  I don't have brothers and sisters.
  I have three fish.
  they are my pets.
  and they are my best friend.

title: D your school life （你的学校生活）
content:
I like my school
  my school is beautiful
  There are  teachers and students
  I have a lot of friends, 
  I am so happy at here

title: E my dream（我的梦想）
content:
I have a dream.
  I want to be a painter （teacher scientist sporter doctor fireman ）

title: F Ending （结语）
content:
Thank you 
Thank you  very much

title: H 介绍他人
content:
she is Alice.
  she's my friend.
  she's a girl.
  she's ten years old.
  she's short.
